metadata.description: Name prefix used for alert rule resources
Resource ID used as alert scope (App Insights component or Log Analytics workspace)
Target resource type for scope (microsoft.insights/components or microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces)
Resource ID of the action group used for alert notifications
cloud_RoleName value emitted by the API telemetry
Error-rate alert threshold in percent over the evaluation window
Minimum request count required before evaluating error-rate alert
p95 latency threshold in milliseconds over the evaluation window
Minimum request count required before evaluating p95 latency alert
Minimum exception count in recent window before evaluating crash-spike alert
Multiplier over baseline exceptions per window to trigger crash-spike alert
Optional tags applied to all alert resources

properties.description: API exception count spiked vs baseline
